description: Shared test vectors for the stream-resume v1 state machine (see provider/src/protocol.rs InferenceResume invariants). Consumed by infra/advisor/src/resume-vectors.test.ts (advisor acceptance side) and provider/src/advisor.rs tests (provider replay side) so the two hand-written implementations cannot drift apart silently. next_seq always means: first chunk sequence the advisor has NOT accepted yet.

chunk.name: replayed duplicate is acknowledged but not re-delivered
forward gap is not accepted; high-water asks for a replay

resume.name: provider ahead of advisor resumes; tail replays from the high-water
provider behind the advisor is rejected (state loss)
advisor claiming more than produced is a protocol violation; provider cancels

completion.name: completion accepted only when finalSeq equals the high-water
completion racing ahead of a missing chunk is rejected
